---
title: "Rexy's Voice"
subtitle: "Hackathon · Nov 2024"
---

## Overview

Rexy's Voice is a full-stack application for structured user interaction and behavioral data analysis.

**Stack:** Node.js · Express · MongoDB · JavaScript · REST APIs · Git / GitHub

## What I built

- Built the application with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB to support interaction and behavioral analysis
- Implemented frontend tracking in JavaScript to capture engagement patterns
- Designed REST APIs to process and aggregate user-generated data into actionable metrics
- Collaborated with a team using Git and GitHub for feature integration and deployment

## Skills demonstrated

Full-stack development · REST APIs · User interaction data · Team collaboration
